title: eclipta alba var. erecta
intro: Eclipta alba var. erecta, also known as false daisy or Eclipta, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and North America. The medicinal properties of Eclipta alba var. erecta lie in its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which makes it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote hair growth, improve liver function, and reduce stress and anxiety, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for hair loss and skin care. Eclipta alba var. erecta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
